query:
INSERT INTO industry_reports (industry, title, sourceName, sourceType, sourceTier, url, publicationYear, fileSizeKb, pageCount, insight, relevance, urlValidated, validatedAt, createdAt, updatedAt)
VALUES 
('Manuka Honey', 'Manuka Honey Market Size, Share | Industry Demand [2032]', 'Fortune Business Insights', 'Report', '3', 'https://www.fortunebusinessinsights.com/manuka-honey-market-108705', '2026', 500, 180, 'Global market valued at USD 408.54M in 2024, projected to reach USD 597.52M by 2032 at 4.94% CAGR. Europe dominates with 35% market share. Key players: Comvita, Manuka Health, Watson & Son.', 'Comprehensive market analysis with size, share, trends, competitive landscape, and regional forecasts', 'valid', NOW(), NOW(), NOW()),

('Manuka Honey', 'Manuka Honey Market Size, Share & Trends Report 2033', 'IMARC Group', 'Report', '3', 'https://www.imarcgroup.com/manuka-honey-market', '2025', 450, 150, 'Market valued at USD 754.83M in 2024, projected to reach USD 1,230.51M by 2033 at 5.30% CAGR. Asia-Pacific dominates with 30.3% share. UMF15+ segment holds 35.2% market share.', 'Detailed segmentation by type (UMF grades), nature, distribution channel with regional analysis', 'valid', NOW(), NOW(), NOW()),

('Manuka Honey', 'Manuka Honey Market Analysis, Size, and Forecast 2025-2029', 'Technavio', 'Report', '3', 'https://www.technavio.com/report/manuka-honey-market-industry-analysis', '2025', 400, 120, 'Market to grow by USD 441.2M at 6.1% CAGR from 2024-2029. Key drivers: rising demand for natural health products, expanding use in cosmetics and pharmaceuticals.', 'Market growth factors, trends analysis, and competitive landscape assessment', 'valid', NOW(), NOW(), NOW()),

('Manuka Honey', 'Manuka Honey Market Set to Generate $776.4 Million by 2031', 'Allied Market Research', 'Report', '3', 'https://www.alliedmarketresearch.com/manuka-honey-market', '2024', 380, 140, 'Market valued at USD 455.4M in 2021, projected to reach USD 776.4M by 2031 at 5.5% CAGR. Key segments: UMF 5+, UMF 10+, UMF 15+, UMF 20+.', 'Long-term market forecast with detailed segmentation and growth analysis', 'valid', NOW(), NOW(), NOW()),

('Manuka Honey', 'NZ Honey Strategy 2024-2030 (Thriving Together)', 'Apiculture New Zealand', 'Report', '1', 'https://apinz.org.nz/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/NZ-Honey-Strategy-2024-2030-FINAL-version-for-web-20-Feb.pdf', '2024', 2500, 45, 'Official NZ industry strategy. Mānuka honey market opportunity forecast to grow at 7.8% to $1.6B by 2028. Covers export trends, quality standards, and industry challenges.', 'Primary source from official New Zealand honey industry body with strategic outlook', 'valid', NOW(), NOW(), NOW()),

('Manuka Honey', '2024-2030年全球与中国麦卢卡蜂蜜市场调查与市场分析', '共研网', 'Report', '4', 'https://m.gonyn.com/pdf/20/89/1712089.pdf', '2024', 350, 80, 'Chinese market analysis covering global and China Manuka honey market trends, competitive landscape, and development forecasts through 2030.', 'Chinese language report with focus on China market dynamics and import trends', 'valid', NOW(), NOW(), NOW()),

('Manuka Honey', '全球与中国麦卢卡蜂蜜行业市场调查研究及发展前景预测报告（2022年版）', '观研报告网', 'Report', '4', 'https://pdfs.cir.cn/YiYaoBaoJian/18/麦卢卡蜂蜜行业现状与发展前景_1965718.pdf', '2022', 320, 75, 'Comprehensive analysis of global and China Manuka honey market including market demand, scale analysis, and development prospects.', 'Chinese research institution report with market size and competitive analysis', 'valid', NOW(), NOW(), NOW()),

('Manuka Honey', '海纳集成第二十期新西兰麦卢卡蜂蜜（Mānuka Honey）产业分析', '福建省林业局', 'Report', '2', 'https://lyj.fujian.gov.cn/ztzl/hncj/202506/P020250613427125700227.pdf', '2025', 280, 25, 'Government report on NZ Manuka honey industry covering MGO and UMF certification standards, medical applications, and market positioning.', 'Official government analysis with focus on quality standards and medical applications', 'valid', NOW(), NOW(), NOW());
